$ echo $?

**Python version tested on**
<!-- output of `python3 --version` -->


**Checklist**
- [ ] The file has a docstring at the top explaining why it shouldn't work
- [ ] I ran it and it exits `0` (or, if it's a `Black_Magic/` entry, I documented the crash as intended)
- [ ] I did not fix the bug. That is not what we do here.
- [ ] I updated the folder's `README.md` with a one-line description of the new file
- [ ] This has never, and will never, touch production (again)
